$comment: MCP servers shared with the team. v3: all five pinned to verified npm versions as of May 2026. Research notes inline. Tokens come from environment variables — do not commit secrets.

github.$comment: v3 upgrade: was 2024.11.25 (a year stale), now 2025.11.25 (latest stable).

google-analytics.$comment: v3 fix: original @google-analytics/mcp does not exist on npm. Replaced with verified community package.

_optional_profound.$comment: v3 fix: original @otterly/mcp does not exist. Replaced with profound-mcp (Profound). Alternative: mcp-server-peecai@1.2.0 for Peec.ai. Uncomment and rename key when ready.
